    "Box fill capacity exceeded based on conductor count, device, and equipment grounding conductor volume allowances."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace the existing electrical box with a larger volume box or add an extension ring to comply with NEC 314.16 volume allowances.",
    "Re-pull or re-splice conductors as necessary to maintain minimum free conductor length of 6 inches per NEC 300.14."
  ],
  "rationale": "The observed field condition indicates that the box fill exceeds the maximum allowable volume calculated under NEC 314.16. Overfilled boxes pose a significant risk of insulation damage, short circuits, and electrical fires.",

  ]
